items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United to tempt Palmer,...
items.summary: Chelsea midfielder Cole Palmer would consider a move to Manchester United, while the club also want Arsenal left back Myles Lewis-Skelly. Transfer Talk has the latest.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: What we know about the upcoming Commissioner's Cup...
items.summary: The PBA Commissioner's Cup playoffs are almost here -- but there's still plenty to be decided in the final elimination games.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Former India Under-19 cricketer Amanpreet Singh Gill dies at 36
items.summary: Amanpreet Singh Gill played youth one-dayers and a three-day Test in 2007, touring England, Malaysia and Sri Lanka with the India Under-19 team in that period
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
